members.name: collisionDetectionAlgorithm
members.description:
The collision detection algorithm to use for drag and drop
Can be overridden by subclasses or configured per interaction type

members.name: dragState
members.default: { dragging: false, dragSource: null, dragClone: null, startOffset: { x: 0, y: 0 }, currentTarget: null, sourceDroppable: null, inputType: null }

declarations.description:
Drag/drop mixin that keeps a single list of sortable draggables.
Draggables are treated as both the draggable items and the drop targets.
A response is the ordered list of `identifier` attributes for all draggables.
declarations.name: DragDropSortableMixin

members.name: placePlaceholder
members.description:
Place the placeholder element at the appropriate position.
Uses the sorting strategy to calculate insertion position.
Applies FLIP animations to siblings when they move.

members.name: reorderDOMByIdentifiersLocal

parameters.name: animate
parameters.description: Whether to animate the reordering (default: true)

members.description:
Reorder DOM elements to match a given array of identifiers.
Uses FLIP animation technique for smooth transitions.

members.name: #dataTransfer
members.default: { data: {}, setData(type, val) { this.data[type] = val; }, getData(type) { return this.data[type]; }, effectAllowed: 'move' }

members.name: configuration
members.default: { copyStylesDragClone: true, dragCanBePlacedBack: true, dragOnClick: false }

members.name: dataTransfer
members.default: { data: {}, setData(type, val) { this.data[type] = val; }, getData(type) { return this.data[type]; }, effectAllowed: 'move' }
